title: Pibblecraft
description: A Vanilla+ modpack for Pixx and Bubble's Youtube series <3
body:
### Overview
Created specifically for our survival YouTube series, Pibblecraft is designed to enhance the core Minecraft experience without breaking the game's original spirit. We wanted a world that feels more alive, rewards exploration, and looks stunning on camera, all while maintaining that classic "Mojang" feel.

### Key Features
- **Performance First:** Powered by Fabric, this pack includes the latest optimization mods (Sodium, Lithium, and Iris) to ensure high frame rates even at high render distances.
- **Enhanced Ambience:** Features subtle sound physics, falling leaves, and better clouds to make the world feel immersive for viewers.
- **Quality of Life:** Small tweaks like Mouse Tweaks, and a Simple Voice Chat integration for seamless multiplayer interaction.
- **World Generation:** Vanilla biomes have been tweaked with Terralith to create breathtaking vistas perfect for base building.

### Usage Note
This pack was curated for a private duo-playthrough. While we welcome you to play along in your own worlds, please note that we may update or change mods frequently to suit the needs of our video production!
